results.title: LayerProof: One canvas for every image asset you need | Product Hunt
results.content:
Thuc Pham

#### What's great

I use LayerProof AI to quickly turn raw data into structured stories with charts and clear sources. It saves me a ton of time compared to doing everything manually, especially when I need something presentable fast. I also like how every claim is linked to its source, which makes the output feel much more reliable.

#### What needs improvement

The UI could be a bit more intuitive at first, and I’d love to see more customization options for charts and outputs.

#### vs Alternatives

I looked at a few other AI tools, but most of them either focus on text generation or basic charts, not both together. LayerProof stood out because it combines storytelling, visualization, and source linking in one place, which makes the workflow much smoother. [...] Nathan Tran
Uselink

Uselink

thank you Thuc 🙏 noted on the UI intuitiveness, that's feedback we've been hearing and actively working on. and more customization on charts/outputs is high on the roadmap, so you'll see that land soon.

appreciate the thoughtful review and the honest ratings

Nguyen Truong
SnapPay

SnapPay

#### What's great

I've been working with a lot of slide generation tools. Those tools are hallucinated and automatically include the data/image that they generate without referencing the source I included.

If LayerProof Chromo could address this problem perfectly, then it would be one of my first choices when thinking about slide generation. Great work team, cant wait to test it

#### vs Alternatives

Use trusted sources for generating slide was a game changer [...] LayerProof

# See what your next deck could look like

+2k

Join 2,847+ professionals already on the waitlist.

## Frequently Asked Questions

What is LayerProof?

LayerProof is an AI-powered tool that transforms raw data and knowledge into verifiable insights, presented as slides, videos, or reports — always backed by sources and clear reasoning.

  How is LayerProof different from typical AI slide generators? [...] Most AI tools focus on speed and visuals. LayerProof focuses on proof and trust. Every insight is connected to data, sources, and logic — not guesses or decorative content.

  How does LayerProof reduce AI hallucinations?

LayerProof prioritizes source-backed data, explicit citations, and clear confidence boundaries. The system avoids generating claims that cannot be supported by evidence.

  What happens if the data is not strong enough?

LayerProof will clearly indicate uncertainty or recommend that the data is insufficient to draw conclusions. The system does not force insights where proof is weak.

  Is it free?

Yes, LayerProof is completely free for all users during our Private Beta phase.

  Which platforms are supported? [...] Every claim is cited

Downtime hurts your deadlines. We’re honest about our uptime status, so you always know where things stand. With 99.99% uptime, you can trust that Ziflow is online right now. Can you say the same for PageProof?

Deliver scalable and reliable solutions - 99.9% uptime and built-in redundancy

### Scales with your team

Invite guests and clients into the review process—no login or extra license required. From intake forms to agency/client collaboration with hub-and-satellite accounts, Ziflow is far more adaptable to the ways you work than PageProof.

Enterprise - Manage any workflow with Ziflow
